prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次约21549→22846→31988→23764→29847，整体波动较大，2023年因批次调整出现明显后移（31988名），2024年回弹至23764名，2025年 再次后移至29847名，近两年呈后移趋势，2025年基准约29847名；本省理科组计划2021–2023年均为35人，2024–2025年增至37人；2026年计划39人，较20 25年扩招约5.4%，扩招使竞争略有加剧，位次数字相应增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名持续上升：2021年第198名→2026年第157名，排名稳步提 升，对考生吸引力有所增强；近年声誉平稳，无明显负面舆情事件；抖音热度排名第79位（评价为一般），短视频平台曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现爆款传 播；历史投档异常记录中未见延边大学，报考心理受舆情干扰较小；延边大学在第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，整体学科实力处于211高校中游水平， 缺乏顶尖学科对高分考生的强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、计算机类、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度持续偏高（2024–2026年均处于推荐/高热推荐区间），与该 校理科招生专业高度重合，可能吸引更多考生关注；本省2026年物理类考生167419人，较2025年173347人减少约3.4%，竞争略有减弱；延边大学位于吉林省延边朝鲜族自治州，距山西省较远，跨省报考存在一定地域偏好阻力；该校在本省招生规模较小（理科组约35–39人），非该校主要生源地。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合扩招5.4%使位次数字增大、考生减少3.4%使竞争略减、软科排名持续上升增强吸引力、临床医学/计算机等热门专业可能吸引更多高分考生等多重因素，考虑专业热度对报考的拉动作用，预测最低位次约30845名，区间30345–31345名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 21549 → 22846 → 31988 → 23764 → 29847, showing significant fluctuations. In 2023, due to batch adjustments, there was a notable backward shift (31988th), rebounding to 23764th in 2024, and then moving back again to 29847th in 2025. The recent two years show a backward trend, with the 2025 baseline around 29847th. The provincial science group enrollment plan was 35 students from 2021 to 2023, increasing to 37 students from 2024 to 2025. The 2026 plan is 39 students, an expansion of about 5.4% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and increases the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science main ranking has been continuously rising: from 198th in 2021 to 157th in 2026, steadily improving, which enhances its appeal to candidates. In recent years, its reputation has been stable with no significant negative public opinion incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 79th (rated as average), with short video platform exposure at a medium-to-low level, without any viral content. No abnormal historical admission records have been found for Yanbian University, so the psychological impact of public opinion on applications is minimal. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Yanbian University has no disciplines rated A- or above, placing its overall academic strength at the mid-level among 211 universities, lacking top-tier disciplines to strongly attract high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Clinical Medicine, Computer Science, and Electronic Information/Communication have consistently high social popularity (recommended or highly recommended from 2024 to 2026), which highly overlaps with the university's science admissions majors, potentially attracting more candidates. In 2026, the province has 167,419 physics category candidates, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly reducing competition. Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin Province, far from Shanxi Province, so cross-province applications face some geographical preference resistance. The university's enrollment scale in this province is small (about 35–39 students in the science group), and it is not a major source of students for the university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as a 5.4% expansion increasing the ranking number, a 3.4% decrease in candidates slightly reducing competition, the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking enhancing appeal, and popular majors like Clinical Medicine and Computer Science potentially attracting more high-scoring candidates, along with the driving effect of major popularity on applications, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 30845th, with a range of 30345–31345th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 30345–31345, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Clinical Medicine, Computer Science) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 30345), you can focus on applying for Tier 1 popular majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit, prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Communication Engineering and Economics to ensure admission probability.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 4217 → 4419 → 5709 → 4635 → 6026, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2023, due to batch adjustments, it significantly shifted back to 5709, rebounded to 4635 in 2024, and moved back again to 6026 in 2025. Over the past three years, it has cumulatively shifted back by about 1800 places, with a baseline of approximately 6026 in 2025. The provincial liberal arts group plan had 24 students each year from 2021 to 2025; in 2026, the plan is 22 students, a reduction of about 8.3% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and correspondingly reduces the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking has been continuously rising: from 198th in 2021 to 157th in 2026, showing steady improvement and increasing attractiveness to candidates. In recent years, its reputation has been stable with no significant negative public opinion incidents; its Douyin popularity ranking is 79th (rated as average), indicating a medium-to-low level of exposure on short video platforms. No abnormal admission records have been found for Yanbian University, so the impact of public opinion on application psychology is minimal. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Yanbian University has no disciplines rated A- or above, placing its overall disciplinary strength at the mid-level among 211 universities, lacking top-tier disciplines to strongly attract high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially popular (recommended in both 2023 and 2024), and they highly overlap with the university's liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, History, etc.), potentially attracting more liberal arts candidates. In 2026, the number of history category candidates in the province is 63,113, a decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025, significantly reducing competition. Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin Province, which is far from Shanxi Province, creating some regional preference resistance for cross-province applications. The university's enrollment scale in this province is small (about 22–24 students in the liberal arts group), and it is not a major source of students for the university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as an 8.3% enrollment reduction reducing the ranking number, a 25.6% decrease in candidates significantly easing competition, continuously rising Soft Science rankings enhancing attractiveness, and popular liberal arts majors like Law and Chinese Language potentially attracting more candidates, and given the substantial reduction in candidate numbers significantly alleviating competitive pressure, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5675, with a range of 5175–6175.
